prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, optimize the thermostability of IL2 (Cytokine) from Homo sapiens. provide a computational approach for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: IL2; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
